claim_text: REPLACE ME - the exact approved claim wording, e.g. 'magnesium is absorbed through the skin during a float'
source_citation: REPLACE ME - the citation that substantiates this claim (study, regulator, primary source). Required for an approved HARD claim.
notes: REPLACE ME - reviewer notes: scope, caveats, who approved it and when. This file is a FAKE format template and is NEVER read at runtime - the gate reads only the real data/claims_register.json.

claim_text: REPLACE ME - a soft/experiential claim, e.g. 'many people report feeling deeply relaxed after a float'
notes: Soft experiential claims do not require a citation; source_citation may be empty.
